markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Finalize the GrowthX partnership for Assort Health's content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/Qik_PDpUm8ZqegsWJWhTTtmAywnSkfBJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Decision:** Assort Health will partner with GrowthX, prioritizing its speed and AI-driven model over a traditional agency like Directive.](https://fathom.video/share/Qik_PDpUm8ZqegsWJWhTTtmAywnSkfBJ?tab=summary&timestamp=45.0)
  - [**Scope:** The initial contract is for content creation only. Web development (e.g., pillar page templates) will be handled by Assort's internal contractor, with a potential for a bundled, extended scope with GrowthX's partner, Webstacks.](https://fathom.video/share/Qik_PDpUm8ZqegsWJWhTTtmAywnSkfBJ?tab=summary&timestamp=247.0)
  - [**Strategy:** GrowthX will use its "artifacts" (personas, workflows) to create highly specific, specialty-focused content that demonstrates Assort's unique ability to handle complex patient scenarios, moving beyond generic claims.](https://fathom.video/share/Qik_PDpUm8ZqegsWJWhTTtmAywnSkfBJ?tab=summary&timestamp=609.0)
  - [**Next Step:** A final call is scheduled for tomorrow at 8 AM with GrowthX CEO Marcel, during which Brooke will review a draft Statement of Work (SoW).](https://fathom.video/share/Qik_PDpUm8ZqegsWJWhTTtmAywnSkfBJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1580.0)

## Topics

### Partnership Decision: GrowthX vs. Directive

  - [Brooke confirmed the decision to partner with GrowthX, citing its new model as a better fit for a fast-moving startup than Directive's traditional approach.](https://fathom.video/share/Qik_PDpUm8ZqegsWJWhTTtmAywnSkfBJ?tab=summary&timestamp=45.0)
  - [The primary goal is to increase web traffic by \~40% to hit inbound revenue targets.](https://fathom.video/share/Qik_PDpUm8ZqegsWJWhTTtmAywnSkfBJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1347.0)
  - [Brooke will manage the separate goal of increasing site conversion by \~50% internally, believing it requires a distinct, specialist focus.](https://fathom.video/share/Qik_PDpUm8ZqegsWJWhTTtmAywnSkfBJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1347.0)

### GrowthX's AI-Driven Content Model

  - [GrowthX's model is designed for speed, publishing content in weeks, not months.](https://fathom.video/share/Qik_PDpUm8ZqegsWJWhTTtmAywnSkfBJ?tab=summary&timestamp=388.0)
  - [**Phase 1 (8-Week Strategy Sprint):**](https://fathom.video/share/Qik_PDpUm8ZqegsWJWhTTtmAywnSkfBJ?tab=summary&timestamp=526.0)
      - [**Week 1:** Create "artifacts" (personas, Jobs to be Done, workflows) for deep context.](https://fathom.video/share/Qik_PDpUm8ZqegsWJWhTTtmAywnSkfBJ?tab=summary&timestamp=422.0)
      - [**Weeks 2–3:** Develop a "Content OS" (keyword analysis, topic clusters, 500+ assignments).](https://fathom.video/share/Qik_PDpUm8ZqegsWJWhTTtmAywnSkfBJ?tab=summary&timestamp=526.0)
      - [**Weeks 3+:** Publish 5–20 articles to calibrate quality and gather initial data.](https://fathom.video/share/Qik_PDpUm8ZqegsWJWhTTtmAywnSkfBJ?tab=summary&timestamp=562.0)
  - [**Phase 2 (Growth Execution):**](https://fathom.video/share/Qik_PDpUm8ZqegsWJWhTTtmAywnSkfBJ?tab=summary&timestamp=925.0)
      - [A dedicated account lead (e.g., Kathy, William) provides consistent communication via a shared Slack channel and bi-weekly meetings.](https://fathom.video/share/Qik_PDpUm8ZqegsWJWhTTtmAywnSkfBJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1032.0)
      - [A team of Strategy Directors and the CCO (former TechCrunch EIC) are available for strategic support.](https://fathom.video/share/Qik_PDpUm8ZqegsWJWhTTtmAywnSkfBJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1032.0)

### Content Strategy: Specialty-Specific Depth

  - [Brooke emphasized the need to move beyond generic claims of "handling complexity" to specific, specialty-focused examples (Ortho, Derm, Women's Health).](https://fathom.video/share/Qik_PDpUm8ZqegsWJWhTTtmAywnSkfBJ?tab=summary&timestamp=609.0)
  - [**Example Patient Journey (Derm):** A patient with a new spot and a history of skin cancer faces a 20-minute hold, gets stuck in a "cosmetic vs. medical" loop, and struggles to find an available provider.](https://fathom.video/share/Qik_PDpUm8ZqegsWJWhTTtmAywnSkfBJ?tab=summary&timestamp=682.0)
  - [GrowthX's artifacts will capture these nuances, using Assort's internal database of workflows to create content that resonates with specific audiences.](https://fathom.video/share/Qik_PDpUm8ZqegsWJWhTTtmAywnSkfBJ?tab=summary&timestamp=731.0)

### Scope and Logistics

  - [**Initial Scope:** Content creation only.](https://fathom.video/share/Qik_PDpUm8ZqegsWJWhTTtmAywnSkfBJ?tab=summary&timestamp=247.0)
  - [**Web Dev:** Assort's internal Webflow contractor will handle pillar page templates. GrowthX's partner, Webstacks, was noted as a potential option for an extended scope.](https://fathom.video/share/Qik_PDpUm8ZqegsWJWhTTtmAywnSkfBJ?tab=summary&timestamp=341.0)
  - [**Collaboration:** Assort will provide first drafts for core/specialty pages; GrowthX will optimize them for SEO.](https://fathom.video/share/Qik_PDpUm8ZqegsWJWhTTtmAywnSkfBJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1508.0)
  - [**Company Context:** GrowthX was founded in mid-2024 by CEO Marcel (ex-CMO at DeepGram) and grew to $12M ARR in its first year, working with clients like Ramp and Brex.](https://fathom.video/share/Qik_PDpUm8ZqegsWJWhTTtmAywnSkfBJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1206.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Tyler:** Send SoW draft to Brooke.](https://fathom.video/share/Qik_PDpUm8ZqegsWJWhTTtmAywnSkfBJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1689.0)
  - [**Brooke:** Review SoW and add redlines before the call.](https://fathom.video/share/Qik_PDpUm8ZqegsWJWhTTtmAywnSkfBJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1689.0)
  - [**All:** Attend final call with Marcel (GrowthX CEO) tomorrow at 8 AM.](https://fathom.video/share/Qik_PDpUm8ZqegsWJWhTTtmAywnSkfBJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1580.0)
